name: Chewy Popcorn Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat honey in a saucepan until it becomes thin and pours easily.
2. Mix popcorn, oats, raisins, and nuts in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the melted honey over the mixture and stir with a wooden spoon until evenly coated.
4. Press the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for several hours.
6. Press the mixture firmly before cutting into bars.
Serves 12.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 271.3 calories; 6.7 grams total fat; (1.0 gram saturated fat); 6.1 grams protein; 24.3 grams carbohydrates; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 3.5 milligrams sodium.
